title: Commander, Guards Brigade Colonel AO Onasanya, on a courtesy visit to the NDLEA National Headquarters in Abuja
description: Chairman/Chief Executive Officer of NDLEA, Brig. Gen. MB Marwa (Retd) CON, OFR, receives the Commander, Guards Brigade Colonel AO Onasanya, on a courtesy visit to the NDLEA National Headquarters in Ab
html: Chairman/Chief Executive Officer of NDLEA, Brig. Gen. MB Marwa (Retd) CON, OFR, receives the Commander, Guards Brigade Colonel AO Onasanya, on a courtesy visit to the NDLEA National Headquarters in Abuja today, Friday, November 17, 2023
